017package org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
022
023/**
024 * MCP client capability advertisement in {@link InitializeRequest}.
025 */
026@Marshalled
027public class ClientCapabilities {
028
029   private RootsCapability roots;
030   private Map<String, Object> sampling;
031   private Map<String, Object> experimental;
032
033   /**
034    * Roots capability.
035    *
036    * @return The capability, or {@code null} if not set.
037    */
038   public RootsCapability getRoots() {
039      return roots;
040   }
041
042   /**
043    * Sets roots capability.
044    *
045    * @param value The new value.
046    * @return This object (for method chaining).
047    */
048   public ClientCapabilities setRoots(RootsCapability value) {
049      roots = value;
050      return this;
051   }
052
053   /**
054    * Sampling capability (free-form map for forward compatibility).
055    *
056    * @return The sampling map, or {@code null} if not set.
057    */
058   public Map<String, Object> getSampling() {
059      return sampling;
060   }
061
062   /**
063    * Sets sampling capability.
064    *
065    * @param value The new value.
066    * @return This object (for method chaining).
067    */
068   public ClientCapabilities setSampling(Map<String, Object> value) {
069      sampling = value;
070      return this;
071   }
072
073   /**
074    * Experimental capability extensions.
075    *
076    * @return The experimental map, or {@code null} if not set.
077    */
078   public Map<String, Object> getExperimental() {
079      return experimental;
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Sets experimental extensions.
084    *
085    * @param value The new value.
086    * @return This object (for method chaining).
087    */
088   public ClientCapabilities setExperimental(Map<String, Object> value) {
089      experimental = value;
090      return this;
091   }
092}
